summary: Test suite covers core parsing/bumping logic and workflow integration well, but has significant gaps in error handling and edge cases. Unit tests for bumper.ts (parseVersion, parseCommits, determineBump, bumpVersion) are solid with happy-path and some edge cases (breaking markers, scopes). However, no tests for CLI argument parsing, file I/O operations (read/write/append), or error scenarios (missing arguments, missing files). Changelog generation only tested with one mixed-commit scenario—missing edge cases like empty commits or single-category-only scenarios. Workflow structure validation and act-based integration tests are well-designed with reasonable timeout and fixture case tracking. Major gaps: (1) no CLI error path testing, (2) no unit test for applyVersionToFile, (3) limited generateChangelog scenarios, (4) fixture file creation logic not visible. Suite would catch regressions in core logic and workflow integration but would miss CLI failures and boundary conditions.
